calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2009 Dismissal - No Appearance

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Response To Interrogatories And For Sanctions Thereon And Mtn For Deemed Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff University of San Francisco's Motion for order compelling response to interrogatories and for sanctions; and motion for deemed admissions, and for sanctions.
1. Motion for order compelling response to interrogatories granted:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege:
b. Defendant shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's form interrogatories within 10 days of he date of service of this order;
c. Request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within 30 days of this order
2. Motion for deemed admissions granted:
a. The matters set forth in plaintiff's request for admissions (set one) are deemed admitted;
b. Request for sanctions granted: sanctions shall issue in the sum of $250.00, payable within 30 days of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Set For Trial On Jun-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
